query: SELECT name, atoll FROM island_guides WHERE name LIKE '%Dharav%' OR name LIKE '%Fulha%' OR name LIKE '%Goidh%' OR name LIKE '%Maalh%' OR name LIKE '%Kela%' OR name LIKE '%Uthe%' OR name LIKE '%Hanim%' OR name LIKE '%Fuva%' OR name LIKE '%Hitha%' OR name LIKE '%Gan%' OR name LIKE '%Dhang%'
